hooks.command: if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "process.exit(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map?.enabled?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then node "$(cd "$(dirname "$(readlink -f "$0" 2>/dev/null || echo "$0")")/.." 2>/dev/null && pwd)/scripts/map-hook.mjs" inject; fi

if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "process.exit(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map?.enabled?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then node "$(cd "$(dirname "$(readlink -f "$0" 2>/dev/null || echo "$0")")/.." 2>/dev/null && pwd)/scripts/map-hook.mjs" agent-spawning; fi

if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "process.exit(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map?.enabled?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then node "$(cd "$(dirname "$(readlink -f "$0" 2>/dev/null || echo "$0")")/.." 2>/dev/null && pwd)/scripts/map-hook.mjs" agent-completed; fi

if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "process.exit(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map?.enabled?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then node "$(cd "$(dirname "$(readlink -f "$0" 2>/dev/null || echo "$0")")/.." 2>/dev/null && pwd)/scripts/map-hook.mjs" turn-completed; fi
